name: rekkferga
description: A comprehensive ferry information and journey planning platform

scripts.dev:api: cd packages/api && source .venv/bin/activate && python3 -m flask run --host 0.0.0.0 --port 5000
scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:app"
scripts.build:all: npm run build:api && npm run build:web && npm run build:app
scripts.deploy:cron: cd packages/cron && func azure functionapp publish rekkferga-cron
scripts.deploy:all: npm run deploy:api && npm run deploy:web && npm run deploy:cron
scripts.test:all: npm run test:api && npm run test:web && npm run test:app
scripts.lint:all: npm run lint:web && npm run lint:app

author: Your Name
